note: Crosswalk/UE project (reskinned from nyl). Block CODE lives in the repo; page CONTENT is authored in the AEM author citizens site (pending) and imported like nyl.

ueCompatibility: Reuse existing nyl-derived blocks; their UE models already exist (models/*.json + component-definition/models/filters at root). Any new block (fdic-banner) needs a matching _fdic-banner.json model + definition/filter entries per ise-boilerplate ue/ pattern.
assetStrategy: absolute (hotlink Citizens Scene7/asset images for the demo), consistent with the font approach
